name: Turmeric Curcumin + Piperine
summary: Curcumin plus piperine improves curcumin bioavailability and has moderate evidence for inflammation and osteoarthritis pain outcomes.
description: Enhanced-bioavailability curcumin formulation using piperine to increase absorption.
safetyNotes: GI upset; potential bleeding/anticoagulant interaction; piperine may affect drug metabolism.
contraindications: Previous turmeric- or curcumin-associated liver injury because recurrence after re-exposure has been reported.
concurrent use with anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications such as warfarin may increase bleeding risk based on case reports of elevated INR in people taking concentrated curcumin supplements
